//: Standalone bulk-intake project (no Supabase). Hobby: every function capped at 60s (Hobby ceiling). Fluid Compute on -- I/O wait (Vault / Box / LLM round-trips) is not billed as active CPU, and this lane is almost all I/O.
//includeFiles: Ships the shared lib/ folder inside each function bundle so `from lib import ...` resolves (Vercel's Python build does not bundle siblings automatically). The endpoints also add the repo root to sys.path at import time as a belt-and-suspenders.
//pro_upgrade: On Pro later: raise maxDuration to 300 and set INTAKE_MAX_SECONDS to ~280.
